name: Waste Coyote
description: Common Waste predator — crocodile-bear hybrid on all fours, packs of 4–12 led by an alpha. Hunts to eat but can survive long periods without food (possibly ambient P.P.E.). Ambushes with decoys; fearless of guns and most Nightlord minions except Lizard Kings and large Hound/Hunter/Nightbane parties. Non-sentient animal intelligence.

metadata.famineSurvivalNote: months to possibly years without eating

classAbilities.name: Animal Intelligence
classAbilities.description: I.Q. 2D4 — high animal intelligence; cunning pack hunter, not a speaking character race.

classAbilities.name: Tracking
classAbilities.description: Track by both sight and scent at 78% (innate skill).

classAbilities.name: Natural Combat
classAbilities.description: Natural abilities — three attacks per melee round (see metadata); no Hand to Hand or O.C.C. skill program.

classAbilities.name: Combat Bonuses
classAbilities.description: +1 initiative, +4 on all Perception rolls — apply at table in addition to strike/dodge modifiers.

classAbilities.name: Damage
classAbilities.description: Bite 4D6 S.D.C. Claws inflict supernatural P.S. damage plus 2D6 S.D.C.

classAbilities.name: Pack Tactics
classAbilities.description: Packs of 4–12 adults led by an alpha; ambushes often use the weakest member as a decoy while the pack strikes from other directions.

classAbilities.name: Magic & Psionics
classAbilities.description: None.

classAbilities.name: Habitat
classAbilities.description: Nightlands deserts and mountains; packs of 2D6 may appear on Earth via Rifts, gates, or anomalies.

classAbilities.name: Enemies
classAbilities.description: Hunted by Hounds (`race_hound`) and Hunters (`race_hunter`) — pelts decorate Nightlord halls. Preys on most life forms; avoids Lizard Kings (`race_lizard_king`) and large Hound/Hunter/Nightbane war parties.

name: Lizard King
description: Supernatural Komodo-like predator — psychic vampire feeding on death-agonies and P.P.E.; lurks near ley lines and nexuses in the Nightlands and occasionally on Earth. Hunts all living things without fear; Hunter patrols slay on sight. Waste legends tell of tamed war mounts, unproven. Animal intelligence; non-sentient creature stat block.

classAbilities.name: Animal Intelligence
classAbilities.description: I.Q. 1D6 — animal intelligence; too ferocious (or stupid) to fear most threats.

classAbilities.name: Psychic Vampire Feeding
classAbilities.description: Nourishment from death-agonies and P.P.E. Can survive 1D4 months without feeding, or indefinitely within one mile (1.6 km) of a ley line or nexus. Loses 1 P.P.E. per week without feeding unless near ley line/nexus — see metadata.

classAbilities.name: Regeneration
classAbilities.description: Heals 1D4×10 S.D.C./H.P. per minute (4 melee rounds).

classAbilities.name: Senses
classAbilities.description: Nightvision 1000 ft (305 m); fair day vision; track by smell 54% (innate skill).

classAbilities.name: Armor Rating
classAbilities.description: A.R. 12 against normal weapons; A.R. 0 against magical and supernatural attacks.

classAbilities.name: Supernatural Combat
classAbilities.description: Four attacks per melee round (see metadata); no Hand to Hand or O.C.C. skill program.

classAbilities.name: Combat Bonuses
classAbilities.description: +2 on all Perception rolls — apply at table in addition to strike/dodge/save modifiers.

classAbilities.name: Damage
classAbilities.description: Bite 5D6 S.D.C.; kick 3D6 S.D.C.; tail swipe 4D6; head butt 2D6; body ram/trample 5D6 S.D.C.

classAbilities.name: Magic & Psionics
classAbilities.description: None. No languages.

classAbilities.name: Habitat & Enemies
classAbilities.description: Any terrain; favors ley lines and nexuses in the Nightlands and occasionally on Earth. Hunter patrols (`race_hunter`) slay on sight; Hounds (`race_hound`) and other Nightlord minions hunt them. Preys on most life forms without fear. Waste Coyotes (`race_waste_coyote`) typically avoid Lizard Kings. Unproven Waste legends of tamed war mounts.

name: Rage Storm
description: Astral Plane hazard — massive ectoplasmic storm clouds (grey, purple, or red) with contorted faces. Possibly living predators or psychic manifestations of planetary rage. Not player characters; Nightlord minions avoid or destroy them. Hunts astral entities; presence felt before sight.

classAbilities.name: Engulf
classAbilities.description: Sweep victims into swirling ectoplasm — 1D6 S.D.C./H.P. per melee, total disorientation (no combat bonuses, most skills unusable). Escape: one dodge roll per melee. Carried 1D4×100 yards/meter per melee while engulfed.

classAbilities.name: Energy Drain
classAbilities.description: Each engulfed victim saves vs psionics or loses 1D6 P.P.E. or I.S.P. (greater pool). Mind Block adds +6 to save.

classAbilities.name: Buffet
classAbilities.description: Directed force blast — 4D6 S.D.C. +1 per 10 ft (3 m) of length; range 200 ft. Usable inside or outside the body.

classAbilities.name: Regeneration & Dispersal
classAbilities.description: Regenerates 4D6 S.D.C./H.P. per minute. At 0 S.D.C. dispersed into wisps (reforms in 48 hours); at 0 H.P. destroyed.

classAbilities.name: Tactics
classAbilities.description: Flee and hide is the best counter. Rarely pursues after escape unless attacked first. Often expels stunned/unconscious victims; thunders away at 90% S.D.C. loss.

name: Shadow Mantis
description: Void-bound apex predator — Shadow Locust / Void Hunter survivors of an ancient astral invasion. Diabolic; travels alone or in pairs in the Void only (cannot leave). Immune to most energy; fights until target dies or it feeds. Not player characters.

demographics.averageHeight: 10 feet long (3 m); 9 ft (2.7 m) wingspan

classAbilities.name: Void Confinement
classAbilities.description: Cannot leave the Void — prevented from entering the wider Astral Plane.

classAbilities.name: Energy Immunity
classAbilities.description: Invulnerable to lasers, plasma, electricity, Nightbane Talents, psionics, and spell effects. Magic weapons do half damage; physical/kinetic attacks do normal damage.

classAbilities.name: Regeneration
classAbilities.description: 10 S.D.C./H.P. per melee round (Nightbane-fast).

classAbilities.name: Natural Combat
classAbilities.description: Five attacks per melee. Bite 4D6+6; claws 1D4×10+10; grapple 3D6 and victim −6 to defend vs bite.

classAbilities.name: Predator Behavior
classAbilities.description: Attacks without quarter; may pause to feed on a kill while others flee. Lone specimen can threaten all but the strongest astral groups.

name: Dream Fury
description: Mindless Dreamstream predator — constructs of pure anger spawned from nightmare rage. Wander in groups of 1D4+1; incite berserk violence and mimic past enemies. Not player characters; no other dream creature associates with them.

classAbilities.name: Alter Shape
classAbilities.description: Half a pack mimics enemies from targets' past — fear or fury (save vs insanity/psionic attack). Shape change once per melee.

classAbilities.name: Incite Rage
classAbilities.description: 20 ft radius — save vs psionic attack or berserk attack on all nearby (+1 init/strike/parry); rage lasts 1D6 melees after Fury destroyed.

classAbilities.name: Dream Combat Resistance
classAbilities.description: +5 to save vs dream manipulation.

classAbilities.name: Dream Pool Nightmares
classAbilities.description: May intrude on sleepers' Dream Pools — victims 01–60% chance of unreasonable violence the next 1–2 days.

classAbilities.name: Natural Combat
classAbilities.description: Four attacks per melee; supernatural P.S.; optional claw +1D6–2D6. Some mimics carry normal-damage hand weapons.

name: Dream Persona
description: Dream Pool cast — fragments of a dreamer's personality, memory, or emotion playing a scripted role. GM spawn template for obstacles in a Dream Pool (bit players, Regulars, or rare independents). Not player characters; typical personas cannot leave their birth Pool.

demographics.averageHeight: Human-sized typical; up to 12 ft (3.6 m) nightmarish

classAbilities.name: Dream Pool Bound
classAbilities.description: Typical and Regular personas cannot leave their birth Dream Pool. Removed forcibly: lose 1D6 S.D.C./melee until cohesion fails and they vanish (even Regulars).

classAbilities.name: Role & Skills
classAbilities.description: Skills and gear match the dream story — bit players few/none; Regulars may mirror dreamer skills at same or lower proficiency; imagined skills at base level without bonuses.

classAbilities.name: Inherited Powers
classAbilities.description: If the dreamer had psionics, magic, or (Nightbane) Talents, personas in that Pool may duplicate some or all — Pool-bound only unless independent.

classAbilities.name: Independent Regulars
classAbilities.description: Rare independents wander the Dreamstream with Dream Dancer-equivalent abilities and 1D4 P.P.E.; still cannot materialize on Earth (`race_living_nightmare` covers physical escape).

classAbilities.name: Combat
classAbilities.description: Hand to Hand per role (expert/martial arts/assassin for aggressive personas). Typical +2 vs dream manipulation; Regular +4. Independent supernatural P.S.
